ai_analysis.reason: The DOI resolves to a different title ('Hallucinated citations produced by generative arti...') than the provided BibTeX title ('Fabricated references in academic publishing...'). Additionally, the paper is not found in any major academic databases (CrossRef, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar), despite a future publication year (2026) which would typically be indexed if the DOI was valid for the given title. The combination of a title mismatch on a resolving DOI and complete absence from databases strongly suggests fabrication.
